ddls:
CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category (e.g., American Indian or Alaska Native) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description regarding the demographic group */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category within the demographic category */,
  "sub_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category of the students */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the assessment */,
  "participating_students" INTEGER /* Number of students participating in the assessment */,
  "participation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of enrolled students participating in the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_participation_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES student_demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_participation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_participation_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_participation_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participation record */,
  "valid_scores" INTEGER /* Number of students who received valid scores */,
  "students_with_proficiency" INTEGER /* Number of students scoring at or above proficiency level */,
  "proficiency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students scoring at or above proficiency level */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the students */,
  "median_score" REAL /* Median score of the students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scores_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES student_participation ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assessment */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the assessment (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district" TEXT /* District in which the school is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description pertaining to the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the teacher works */,
  "subject_specialization" TEXT /* Subject area of specialization (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_size" TEXT /* Size of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student in the assessment */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level achieved by the student */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
